title: phyllanthus zambicus
intro: Phyllanthus zambicus, also known as Zambian Phyllanthus, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to southern Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney problems, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Phyllanthus zambicus include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
